'''Jiktha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] junk peddler who lived in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for selling him a faulty [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. Eventually, [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] claimed the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Jiktha some time after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

==Behind the scenes==
Jiktha's bounty is 1,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 500 [[Death/Legends|dead]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
